text:
Speaking directly to founders who prioritize an AI-first mindset:

If you’ve built something from the ground up, navigated chaos, conviction, and sleepless nights, or if you've shut down a company, exited one, or feel you're not done building — this message is for you.

At Lenskart, we are at a stage where multiple businesses within our group are thriving and need leaders who think and act like owners, not just managers.

We are looking to bring ex-founders into Lenskart’s leadership team to run and scale independent businesses within our ecosystem. 

This is not just a job; it’s an opportunity to build again, with:
- Massive distribution already in place
- Strong balance sheet and capital backing
- World-class tech, supply chain, and brand power
- The freedom to think long-term, as a founder should

You will:
- Own a large P&L
- Make real strategic decisions
- Build teams, products, and markets
- Scale businesses to the next 10x

If you’ve ever felt that:
- Your ambition exceeds your last startup
- You want to build at scale without starting from scratch
- You miss the founder’s adrenaline but seek stronger foundations

Then we should connect.

Lenskart is more than just a company — it’s a platform for builders. 

If this resonates with you or someone you respect, reach out. Let’s build the next set of category-defining businesses together. Please apply here on LinkedIn for easier shortlisting. 

— Amit

Earlier today, we spoke about our Q3 Results - growth, margins and AI.
It’s been a long day - earnings call, discussions, travel.

Before heading to the airport, I stopped by our flagship store at Ambience Mall.
The store was quiet. The team had just wrapped up.

And in that silence, you realize something simple:
Companies don’t compound. People do.

Behind every eye test, every store opening, every product launch - there are teams showing up every single day with discipline and belief.

As AI reshapes the world around us, one thing remains constant: culture and commitment matter more than ever.

Grateful to our ground teams across India and internationally. The numbers are theirs.

Sharing a few thoughts from the floor 👇

If you want a full glimpse of how we're doing, I'm sharing our shareholder letter here too: https://lnkd.in/gb8ZmNWW

Today we publish our Q3 FY26 Results.

This quarter feels special ...
- Revenue grew 37% YoY.
- EBITDA crossed 20% for the first time.
- PAT tripled.
- Net Promoter Score reached 81

But what makes it truly different isn’t just the financials.
We conducted 6.3 million eye tests this quarter - nearly 1/2 got access to vision care for the first-time.

Every eye test expands the market.
We are not splitting TAM. We are creating it.

This quarter reinforces something we’ve believed for years:
When AI becomes the operating system of a company, growth and profitability stop being trade-offs - they start compounding together.

The world is changing faster than ever because of AI.
What was not possible a year ago is possible today.
What seems ambitious today will feel basic tomorrow.

At Lenskart, what looks like acceleration is actually years of patient investment in technology finally compounding at scale.

AI is expanding access through remote optometry.
It is predicting store performance before we open.
It is personalizing frame recommendations in real time.
And it is learning with every transaction.

International business is scaling strongly and tracking ahead of where India was at a similar stage.

Meller is unlocking fashion sunglasses globally - showing how our platform can scale digital-first brands across markets.

And with upcoming B smart glasses soft launch, we are taking our first step from eyewear to wearable intelligence.

While this was a strong quarter, we continue to build with a decade-scale lens ✈️ 

The runway is long. 
The moat is widening.
It is still Day Zero toward Vision for Billion!

Detailed Shareholder Letter here: https://lnkd.in/gb8ZmNWW

Thank you for trusting us with both your vision and your capital.
— Peyush

We recently hosted the Masters' Union PGP Bharat cohort at our Bhiwadi plant, and the energy was electric ⚡ 

Students from 30+ cities brought diverse regional perspectives as they got a front row seat to experience the precision, advanced automation, and real-world scale behind every frame 🕶️🌟🌍

At Lenskart, problem-solving isn’t just a value, it’s our engine. Practical learning is where the real breakthroughs happen. 

Showcasing the grit and tech behind our Vision Mission to the PGP Bharat program was a highlight for our team 🚀

Thanks for bringing your curiosity and innovative mindset to Bhiwadi 🤓

Keep building, keep questioning, and keep solving!

Vaneet Mittal Kartik Dwivedi Ashish Sharoan Broadway Sunil Dubey Sudhir Yadav

Why are there so many Lenskart stores everywhere suddenly?

As the bell rang, it wasn’t just the sound of a listing, it marked a new chapter of our journey that began with a simple belief: everyone deserves to see better, live better 🔔

Lenskart is now officially listed on the stock exchange- a milestone that reflects years of passion, innovation, and an unwavering commitment to transforming the way the world sees ⭐

From our very first store to reaching millions of faces across India and beyond, this journey has been shaped by visionaries, dreamers, and doers who believed that eyewear could enable more, not just correct vision.

Today, we celebrate our story rooted in the joy of helping the world see better.

Here’s to every eye we’ve touched, every smile we’ve seen, and every dream still in focus.

Here’s to seeing the future, together 😎

NSE India Peyush Bansal Amit Chaudhary Ramneek Khurana sumeet kapahi

Tomorrow, Lenskart will ring the bell!
To me, it doesn’t feel like an ending - it feels like Day Zero.

I’ve tried to capture what this moment truly means - for me in a letter I wrote tonight, on the eve of our listing.  It’s called...Its Still Day Zero.

And as we begin this new chapter, I want to make India a part of this dream.

If you’re wearing Lenskart glasses - today, tomorrow, or any day - take a selfie and share it with 
hashtag
#VisionForBillion in comments. Let’s build this together - one frame, one smile, one vision at a time.

With gratitude in my heart - to every teammate, customer, and believer who made this possible.

To a journey of dreams and destiny,
Peyush

Hi All,

Technology has always evolved to bring us closer to life — not farther from it. From the earliest computers that expanded human capability to smartphones that placed the world within reach, every wave of innovation has transformed how we live, learn, connect, and create.

The next wave will be even more personal. It won’t live in our pockets. It will live around us — in what we wear, see, and experience each day.

At Lenskart, we’ve always believed eyewear is more than a tool for better vision. It is one of the most natural interfaces between people and the world — and today, it is becoming a doorway to a more intuitive, intelligent, and connected future.

---

🇮🇳 Today marks an important milestone in India’s journey in advanced wearable technology:

We are opening our upcoming AI Camera Smart glasses — B by Lenskart — to India’s developer ecosystem.

This begins a new chapter where eyewear evolves from a product into a platform for innovation.

Developers, creators, and startups across India will soon be able to build experiences that blend seamlessly into everyday life — across fitness, entertainment, learning, accessibility, communication, and more.

This is innovation designed in India with a global mindset, backed by talent, imagination, and the spirit of building for the world.

---

🇮🇳 World-class technology, proudly engineered here

B by Lenskart brings together:

- Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1 Gen 1 chipset

- Sony camera for hands-free photo & video

- Gemini 2.5 Live AI for real-time, conversational intelligence


All built into a lightweight, intuitive frame crafted to feel like a natural extension of you.

This is not just a hardware product — it is the foundation of a full-stack wearable computing platform, where hardware, AI, and software come together with the goal of making India a meaningful contributor to the future of global technology.

---

🇮🇳 A platform for India’s builders

India has some of the most creative developers, designers, and innovators anywhere in the world.

By opening this platform, we hope to enable them to push boundaries, build breakthrough use cases, and create solutions that can travel globally.

If you are a developer, creator, or builder exploring the future of human–technology interaction, we would love for you to be part of this journey.

https://lnkd.in/ghjd5wRf

---

Let’s reimagine how the world sees.

Let’s build what comes next.
Let’s make it B by Lenskart —
From India, with ambition for the world.

I sat down with Peyush Bansal over coffee and a bowl of beetroot crisps.

What struck me wasn’t the scale of what he’s built with Lenskart.com.
It was his ability to see luck for what it is and still take bold bets.

Peyush is one of the rare founders who openly credits variance, or what Nassim Taleb calls the luck factor, in shaping his journey.

Over two decades, he’s made calls that seemed reckless at the time.
But in hindsight, they moved the needle in ways few could’ve seen.

One story stayed with me.
When Lenskart franchise owners threatened to strike because he insisted they all buy a few iPads each to record customer data in-store, he didn’t blink.
He held firm.

That single call transformed Lenskart into one of India’s most data-rich consumer brands.
And it changed the entire customer experience.

The coffee kept flowing. So did the conversation.
Unhurried, reflective, the kind that finds its own rhythm.

Today, Lenskart has cracked the eyewear game in a way few others have in Asia.
With myopia rates rising, that bet still has a long runway ahead.

And now, with the IPO around the corner, Peyush could become India’s first startup billionaire this year.

After nearly two decades of conversations with founders, investors, and leaders across geographies, I’ve come to believe this:

In startups, whether early or mature, the most important metric isn’t revenue or valuation.
It’s the founder.
 Their disposition.
 Their awareness.
 Their strength.
 That’s what determines whether a company survives once the early luck runs out.

That’s why Peyush’s story stands out.
Because he can look back and see those turning points for what they were, a mix of timing, risk, and luck.

He’s more cautious now.

But if there’s one “reckless” bet I hope he makes again, it’s on smart glasses.
I tried an early beta version.
Lighter than Meta’s. Solid audio-video. Built-in payments interface.
The AI still needs work, but the potential is massive.

Taleb wrote:
 Mild success can be explained by skill.
 Wild success? That’s variance.

Peyush Bansal sits right in that in-between.
Where skill meets serendipity.

Morning 7 AM experiments with B 👓🤖
The future’s getting ready… coming soon for all. 😊

Rising Kids Myopia is a topic I am very emotional and passionate about. It's been 2 years we at Lenskart.com have been working on how to improve the life of kids who have myopia and wear glasses. Despite being such a large and glaring problem, because it is still very commercially attractive, very little is happening in this space I feel. 

We took it up as a purpose project as it ties to our mission of allowing people to do more & be more through their glasses...and how can this be complete without kids and our next generation. 

It took 2 years of belief, lots of failures, relentless hustling and consumer backward problem solving and 18 moulds to create this 🔩🔩

So presenting to you our most revolutionary product by lenskart in the last 10 years...😇

The CreatR...to allow kids to create the world and dreams they want 💭

Creatr is the only fully Customisable, 100% Unbreakable, zero paint (to avoid any chemical allergies) glasses for kids, which they can adjust to get 100% perfect fit i.e 100% perfect vision. 💯 and at a price you will be surprised 😯 (we decided in some areas we have to let go off our ideal margin to allow every kid to transform their lives 🧑‍🚀 it's also important for us to build an empathetic organization culture in the long term 💗)

(sorry the video is a bit long and salesy, but I couldn't help as there is a lot of passion, emotion and purpose behind this one :)

We are almost at the end of 2024 and nothing spells ‘Festive’ like the last couple of months of the year.

We, Indians, like to dress up for all our occasions, the joy of ‘dressing right’ and getting those wonderful compliments from friends and family is unparalleled. 

At Lenskart.com, our mission is to improve people's quality of life through their eyewear and hence we have created a unique range that elevates your festive looks to another level...The Indian Accent ! 

Check the video out and wishing you all a great festive season full of love , laughter and a whole lot of compliments :)
